name: Statutes of Limitations for Machine Claims

mainEntity.name: When does machine injury claim become time-barred in South Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: When does machine injury claim become time-barred in South Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: 6 years from accident for comp hearing application, but report within 180 days; third-party suits 4 years.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Act fast—latent injuries extend slightly. South Salt Lake deadlines strict. Calendar alerts via attorney prevent bar.[4]

description: 6 years from accident for comp hearing application, but report within 180 days; third-party suits 4 years.[4]
